zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton於1513年1月3日出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾可萊吉時，他的父親Lord John Wallace of Riccarton28歲，母親Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll23歲。他於1529年與Margaret Sophia Kennedy在蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1540年之前，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾可萊吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton于1513年1月3日出生在苏格兰艾斯爾可萊吉时，他的父亲Lord John Wallace of Riccarton28岁，母亲Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll23岁。他于1529年与Margaret Sophia Kennedy在苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1540年之前，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾可萊吉。

nameMeanings.name: Wallace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Wallis  , especially in Scotland, where the name was introduced from the Welsh Marches by a family of tenants of the Stewarts in the 12th century.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, e.g.   Wallach  .

variants.name: Wallis
meanings: Scottish and English: from Anglo-Norman French Waleis, Walais ‘Welshman’, also sometimes ‘Breton’ (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning a ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). In western and central England the medieval reference is clearly to Welshmen. In Norfolk and Lincolnshire, the reference was probably to Bretons, many of whom settled in the eastern counties after the Conquest. Compare Welsh , Walsh . The idea that the Scottish surname refers to the Welsh-speaking Britons of Strathclyde is erroneous.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton was born on 3 January 1513, in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Lord John Wallace of Riccarton, was 28 and his mother, Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll, was 23. He married Margaret Sophia Kennedy in 1529, in Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 1540, and was buried in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton est né le 3 janvier 1513, à Craigie, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Lord John Wallace of Riccarton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Sophia Kennedy en 1529, à Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 1540, et a été enterré à Craigie, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton am 3. Januar 1513 in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord John Wallace of Riccarton 28 und seine Mutter Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll 23. Er hat 1529 in Ayrshire, Scotland Margaret Sophia Kennedy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 1540 und wurde in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton è nato il il 3 gennaio 1513 nel Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Lord John Wallace of Riccarton, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Sophia Kennedy nel 1529, nel Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1540, e fu sepolto a Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccartonが1513年1月3日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジで生まれた時，父Lord John Wallace of Riccartonは28歳，母Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyllは23歳であった。1529年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアでMargaret Sophia Kennedyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1540年以前に死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton(이)가 1513년 1월 3일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord John Wallace of Riccarton(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1529년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 Margaret Sophia Kennedy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1540년 이전 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton nasceu em 3 de janeiro de 1513, em Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Lord John Wallace of Riccarton, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Sophia Kennedy em 1529, em Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1540, e foi sepultado em Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton родился 3 января 1513 г. в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Lord John Wallace of Riccarton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Sophia Kennedy в 1529 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 1540 г. и был похоронен в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton nació el 3 de enero de 1513, en Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Lord John Wallace of Riccarton, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Margaret Sophia Kennedy en 1529, en Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 1540, y fue sepultado en Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland.
